mnemonics.title: Color Transformation Types
mnemonics.content: CLINC - Component-wise Linear Independent Nonlinear Inter-channel Complex (helps remember the progression from simple to complex transformations)

mnemonics.title: RGB to HSI Conversion
mnemonics.content: Hue Is Separated Intensity - Remember that HSI separates Hue and Saturation (color information) from Intensity (brightness information)
